relations.rationale: The parent flow requires an authorized and coverage-scoped root input.
The parent consumes current SourceVersion or NoDelta output.
Canonical claims require anchored evidence or visible gaps.
Matter formation consumes scoped entity decisions.
Matter formation and state consume typed temporal traces.
The parent must terminate source-only, candidate, review, blocked, or admitted explicitly.
Admitted Matters require canonical lifecycle and board output.
Open loops and blocking are independent state axes consumed by outcome and projection.
The parent consumes explicit outcome or conflict disposition.
Corrections and revocations must invalidate and re-enter original owners.
Advisory analysis may contribute candidates but never canonical writes.
The terminal result is delivered through one current bilingual projection revision.
Private runtime data must remain outside the public repository throughout the flow.

source_surfaces.rationale: The UI is an alternate surface for the same correction intent, not a new commitment or writer.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: UI action-chain evidence delegates to C10 and renders C12 output

source_surfaces.label: Guard and prediction boundary specification
source_surfaces.rationale: This is the requirements surface for C11.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: strict OpenSpec validation and C11 mapping

source_surfaces.label: Bilingual inventory, freshness, depth, review, and Matter projection specification
source_surfaces.rationale: This is the requirements surface for C12.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: strict OpenSpec validation and C12 mapping

source_surfaces.label: Private runtime root requirements in the privacy and release specification
source_surfaces.rationale: This plane-specific projection prevents a shared source document from creating a shared execution owner.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: runtime-root requirements map only to the product-runtime commitment

source_surfaces.label: Publication requirements in the privacy and release specification
source_surfaces.rationale: This plane-specific projection keeps public release ownership separate from runtime storage behavior.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: publication requirements map only to the development-process commitment

source_surfaces.label: Runtime privacy rules in the G0 scope manifest
source_surfaces.rationale: This projection maps only the product-runtime portion of the shared manifest.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: machine-readable runtime-root scope review

source_surfaces.label: Development gate rules in the G0 scope manifest
source_surfaces.rationale: This projection maps only the development-process portion of the shared manifest.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: machine-readable process-gate scope review

source_surfaces.label: OpenSpec G0-G12 staged delivery tasks
source_surfaces.rationale: This task projection delegates only the gated-delivery intent.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: strict OpenSpec validation and immutable gated-delivery SpecContext

source_surfaces.label: OpenSpec Jira slice tasks
source_surfaces.rationale: The historical Jira plan remains discoverable but cannot authorize execution.
source_surfaces.scoped_out_reason: Jira/Rovo are deferred post-v0.1 and BC-DP-004 replaces the required slice.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: dormant source-only adapter; zero required v0.1 runtime, install, first-run, acceptance, or release gate

source_surfaces.label: OpenSpec public release tasks
source_surfaces.rationale: This task projection delegates only the clean-source release intent.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: strict OpenSpec validation and immutable release SpecContext

source_surfaces.label: Bounded Jira discovery and slice plan
source_surfaces.rationale: The historical Jira plan remains discoverable but cannot authorize execution.
source_surfaces.scoped_out_reason: Jira/Rovo are deferred post-v0.1 and BC-DP-004 replaces the required slice.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: dormant source-only adapter; zero required v0.1 runtime, install, first-run, acceptance, or release gate

source_surfaces.label: Public/private/vault and publication invalidation policy
source_surfaces.rationale: This is a release promise surface and delegates to the single clean-source release path.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: G11 public inventory through G12 anonymous recheck

source_surfaces.label: AI, multimodal, OCR, and terminal-receipt operation requirements
source_surfaces.rationale: This plane-specific projection owns agent execution, not C11 canonical registration.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: strict OpenSpec validation plus A0 operation contract and terminal-receipt matrix

source_surfaces.label: Abstract ResearchOperation contract requirements
source_surfaces.rationale: The abstract operation is the only research-analysis execution contract.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: strict OpenSpec validation plus deterministic ResearchOperation conformance

source_surfaces.label: Single ResearchGuard provider and pending-integration requirements
source_surfaces.rationale: This is a second requirements surface for the same operation and delegates to its singular path.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: frozen external identity, compatibility, native validation, installed currentness, and no legacy fallback

source_surfaces.label: Progressive private first-run task inventory
source_surfaces.rationale: OpenSpec tasks delegate the source-neutral first-run process to DPF.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: strict OpenSpec validation and current DPF reconciliation

source_surfaces.label: Proposal-level candidate universe and progressive first-run promise
source_surfaces.rationale: This plane-specific projection covers only the execution lifecycle, not product state.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: proposal/design/spec/task consistency and current DPF mapping

source_surfaces.label: Immutable app-local consumer Skill Pack requirements
source_surfaces.rationale: The requirements surface delegates bundle inventory to the auxiliary skill-runtime owner.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: S0-S1 inventory, package parity, consumer-only scan, and clean-machine internal execution

source_surfaces.label: Compatible active skill view requirements
source_surfaces.rationale: The active view is a process authority and never changes bundled bytes or product semantics.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: S0-S3 compatibility, exact identity, native validation, and deterministic disposition matrix

source_surfaces.label: Matters-managed skill synchronization and rollback requirements
source_surfaces.rationale: Only the explicitly Matters-managed projection is writable.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: S0-S5 ownership, staging, activation, installed currentness, rollback, and unmanaged protection

source_surfaces.label: External ResearchGuard integration freeze requirements
source_surfaces.rationale: This process gate validates the provider but does not execute the ResearchOperation.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: external package/skill/member/manifest/command compatibility, native validation, and currentness

source_surfaces.label: Bounded self-maintenance Model Miss handoff requirements
source_surfaces.rationale: The product may identify maintenance work but cannot live-edit itself.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: same-plane lookup, bounded handoff, ordinary development review, and affected revalidation

source_surfaces.label: Retired separate sourceguard runtime binding
source_surfaces.rationale: The installed legacy skill may remain source-only migration evidence but cannot execute or close ResearchOperation.
source_surfaces.scoped_out_reason: Replaced by the abstract ResearchOperation with one ResearchGuard provider.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: zero active runtime binding, zero fallback, and source-only stale disposition

source_surfaces.label: Retired separate traceguard runtime binding
source_surfaces.rationale: The installed legacy skill may remain source-only migration evidence but cannot execute or close ResearchOperation.
source_surfaces.scoped_out_reason: Replaced by the abstract ResearchOperation with one ResearchGuard provider.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: zero active runtime binding, zero fallback, and source-only stale disposition

source_surfaces.label: Retired separate logicguard runtime binding
source_surfaces.rationale: The installed legacy skill may remain source-only migration evidence but cannot execute or close ResearchOperation.
source_surfaces.scoped_out_reason: Replaced by the abstract ResearchOperation with one ResearchGuard provider.
source_surfaces.validation_boundary: zero active runtime binding, zero fallback, and source-only stale disposition

ledger.validation_boundary: bidirectional OpenSpec coverage, one commitment/intent/path/owner, typed cross-plane relations, explicit legacy/Jira disposition, native BCL review, and visible downstream evidence blockers
